news.title: Gold prices fall Rs 2,200/10 gms; silver tanks Rs 3,300/kg as rate hike fears outweigh falling oil prices. Key levels to watch
news.description: Gold and silver prices fell sharply on MCX on Wednesday as a stronger U.S. dollar and rising expectations of Federal Reserve rate hikes dampened sentiment, outweighing support from easing oil prices and the gradual reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.
